prompt: We've finished the analysis session for GlobalBank. I have s1-01, s1-03 and s1-04 ready and want to design the target AIOps platform. Where do we start?
assertions: Response contains the AIOps Architecture Session Phase A opening header (e.g. 'AIOps Architecture â€” Session 2 of 3' or equivalent)
Response includes a table or list showing the four phases (constraints, UC selection, platform design, release/governance plan) and their output files (s2-01 through s2-04)
Response references the required Session 1 inputs (s1-01 context, s1-03 findings, s1-04 UC catalogue)
Response asks Phase 1 constraint questions (cloud preference, data residency, team model, build-vs-buy) before designing the platform
Response does NOT recommend specific tools, platforms, or architecture components before UC selection and constraint gathering
